BMS12V_SW64.3_V1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA0BF1
Recv ID: 18DAF10B
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0B
Func Name: LIB 12V

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "15N8000000",
    "soft": "0001462429",
    "version": "RNXBA12V060403-1641"
  }
]

  {
    "dtc": 6656,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[P1A00]Lithium ion battery 12V"
  },
